title: micromeria mahanensis
intro: Micromeria mahanensis, also known as Mahan's mint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Micromeria mahanensis include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and providing antioxidant protection. The herbal preparations of this plant can be consumed as teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be used topically to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
